Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: An in-app notification delivered to a patient, caretaker, or doctor

recipient_id.description: UID of the user receiving the notification

recipient_role.description: Role of the recipient (patient, caretaker, or doctor)

type.description: Type of notification (emergency, appointment, caretaker_invite, vitals_log, alert, doctor_update)

related_id.description: Optional ID of a related document (e.g., appointment, alert)

read.description: Whether the notification has been read
